subject: fix(charts): add allow-same-origin to iframe sandbox so charts can fetch data
body:
Without allow-same-origin, sandboxed iframes are treated as opaque origins
and cannot make fetch/XHR requests to load chart data from the repo-tor API.
The embed script loaded successfully but charts rendered empty because all
network requests from within the iframe were blocked.

Tags: embed, charts, iframe, sandbox
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: activity-charts
Semver: patch

title: add allow-same-origin to iframe sandbox so charts can fetch data
